description: A dispatcher monitors haul truck payloads in real-time to ensure they are being loaded correctly, avoiding underloading (inefficient) and overloading (unsafe).

nodes.task_description: Review the live feed of payload data from the Fleet Management System.

expected_outcome.value: A dashboard shows the payload for each truck as it is loaded.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert that truck HT-61 was overloaded by 10% on its last load from shovel SH-203.

expected_outcome.value: The dispatcher acknowledges the overload alert.

nodes.task_description: Send a message to the operator of shovel SH-203 to be more careful with the number of passes per truck.

expected_outcome.value: The shovel operator receives and acknowledges the feedback.
